_meta.WARNING: claude_v3 gold labels are single-annotator, read against chunks_sme.txt, NOT verified against source PDFs. Spot-check before trusting as gold.

questions.question: What is Kibuga's returns window?
questions.answer: Two (2) days free returns policy

questions.question: What is the minimum age to register on the marketplace?
questions.answer: 18 years of age

questions.question: What is Kibuga's customer support phone number?
Where are Kibuga's headquarters?
questions.answer: Muganzirwazza Commercial Plaza, Lubiri Road, Plot 1446 Bulange - Mengo, Kampala

_evidence.matched: muganzirwazza commercial plaza lubiri road plot 1446 bulange mengo

questions.question: What is the customer support email address?
questions.answer: support@kibuga.com

questions.question: How many pick-up attempts will Kibuga make for a return?
questions.answer: 3 attempts within 2 working days

questions.question: How long do I have to send something back?
questions.answer: 2 days from delivery date

questions.question: Can a teenager open an account?
questions.answer: No - you may not register if under 18 years of age

questions.question: What paperwork do I need to bring back a purchase?
questions.answer: Proof of purchase, original packaging, any free promotional items

questions.question: Which goods can't be sent back?
questions.answer: Innerwear, swimsuits, gym wear, sleep wear, perfumes, jewelry, health & wellness products, adult toys

_evidence.matched: innerwear swimsuits gym wear sleep wear perfumes jewelry health wellness products adult toys

questions.question: How do I get in touch if something goes wrong?
questions.answer: Customer Service Call Center 0742511381/0742511394, or support@kibuga.com

questions.question: How long does a refund take to process?
questions.answer: The process may take up to 2 days from when the return request was submitted

_evidence.matched: the process may take up to 2 days from when

questions.question: What happens if my return claim is rejected?
questions.answer: If the claim is invalid the item will be sent back to you

_evidence.matched: if the claim is invalid the item will be sent back to you

questions.question: What kinds of content am I forbidden from posting?
questions.answer: Offensive, obscene, indecent, pornographic, lewd, suggestive, sexually explicit; violence; blasphemous or hateful content

_evidence.matched: offensive obscene indecent pornographic lewd suggestive

questions.question: What personal data does Kibuga collect?
questions.answer: Personal data collected when you visit the website or mobile applications

questions.question: What warranty does a seller give about the products?
questions.answer: Seller warrants good title, sole legal and beneficial owner, no third-party rights or restrictions

questions.question: Can Kibuga suspend my account without telling me?
questions.answer: We may suspend or cancel your account at any time in our sole discretion and without notice or explanation

_evidence.matched: at any time in our sole discretion and without notice or explanation

questions.question: What is the full returns procedure from request to refund?
questions.answer: Contact call centre, 3 pickup attempts in 2 working days, quality check, refund per requested method within 2 days

questions.question: What are all the ways Kibuga can refund me?
questions.answer: Store credits, wallet refunds, vouchers, mobile money transfer, bank transfers

_evidence.matched: store credits wallet refunds vouchers mobile money transfer bank transfers

questions.question: Where is Kibuga's registered office located?
questions.answer: Muganzirwaza Commercial building plaza, Lubiri ring road (registered in Uganda).

questions.question: Do I pay shipping charges when returning a product to Kibuga?
questions.answer: No, there are no charges for shipping a product back to Kibuga.

questions.question: Who do I contact to exercise my data privacy rights?
questions.answer: The Data Privacy Officer at support@kibuga.com.

questions.question: Am I allowed to print pages from Kibuga's website?
questions.answer: Yes, for your own personal and non-commercial use, provided printing is not systematic or excessive.

questions.question: How long does Kibuga hang on to my information?
questions.answer: As long as necessary for the purposes in the Privacy Notice; it is deleted or anonymized when no longer needed.

questions.question: What sorts of goods are sellers banned from listing?
questions.answer: Products that breach laws/regulations, infringe IP or other rights, contravene content rules, or relate to prohibited categories such as drugs.

questions.question: Can I ask Kibuga to delete everything they know about me?
questions.answer: Yes — your legal rights include erasing your personal data, plus access, correction, restriction, portability and unsubscribing.

questions.question: Are the prices shown on the marketplace inclusive of VAT?
questions.answer: Yes — all amounts stated on the marketplace are inclusive of VAT and any other applicable taxes.

questions.question: Can Kibuga move my data to another country?
questions.answer: Yes, where permissible by law, with measures to ensure a similar level of protection as the country of origin.

questions.question: What can Kibuga do to me if I break the rules?
questions.answer: Temporarily suspend or permanently prohibit access, block your IP, and ask your ISPs to block your access.

questions.question: Which outside parties might see my personal data?
questions.answer: Third-party sellers, service providers (fulfilment, payment, marketing), parties in business transfers, and fraud/compliance bodies.

questions.question: Does Kibuga use my data for advertising?
questions.answer: Yes — data is collected for marketing/optimization and Kibuga uses Google Digital Marketing for targeted offers.

questions.question: If I have a legal dispute with Kibuga, whose courts decide it?
questions.answer: The courts of the territory (Uganda) have exclusive jurisdiction; the terms are governed by the laws of the territory.

questions.question: Across all the policies, what enforcement actions can Kibuga take against a seller who breaches the terms?
questions.answer: Formal warnings, suspension/prohibition/blocking of access, IP blocking, penalties under the Seller Penalty Policy, and legal action.

questions.question: How does Kibuga handle a seller's money — what gets deducted and what's left?
questions.answer: Kibuga collects buyer payments, deducts commissions (a % of VAT-inclusive selling price), fees, taxes, penalties, refunds and other owed amounts, then remits the remainder.

questions.question: Walk me through everything I need to know to return an item and get my money back.
questions.answer: Notify within 2 days by calling Customer Service with proof of purchase and original packaging; Kibuga makes 3 pickup attempts in 2 working days; no shipping charge; no returns after 2 days; gifts must be returned.
